title: rubus erlangeri
intro: Rubus erlangeri is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, commonly known as a wild or native raspberry. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Rubus erlangeri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some cultures as a food ingredient, particularly in jams and preserves.
